background_strategy.source_consistency_contract: Use an off-white paper-like solid background and rebuild all foreground text, cards, arrows, labels, thread coils, and icons as editable native objects.
background_strategy.removed_foreground: None removed from a clean base; all source foreground objects are independently reconstructed.
background_strategy.comparison_note: The source page has a simple paper background without required bitmap identity, so a native solid background is acceptable and avoids baked text overlap.
